scripts.dev: node ../../scripts/check-port.mjs 4322 && COMPARE_SITE=https://kpshelkovo.online COMPARE_BASE=/compare COMPARE_CANONICAL_SITE=https://kpshelkovo.online COMPARE_CANONICAL_BASE=/compare COMPARE_DEV_PORT=4322 astro dev --port 4322
scripts.build:section: COMPARE_SITE=https://kpshelkovo.online COMPARE_BASE=/compare COMPARE_OUT_DIR=dist/section COMPARE_CANONICAL_SITE=https://kpshelkovo.online COMPARE_CANONICAL_BASE=/compare astro build && node ../../scripts/flatten-compare-sitemap.mjs dist/section
scripts.build:legacy: COMPARE_SITE=https://сравни.шелково.рф COMPARE_BASE=/ COMPARE_OUT_DIR=dist/legacy COMPARE_CANONICAL_SITE=https://kpshelkovo.online COMPARE_CANONICAL_BASE=/compare COMPARE_SITEMAP=false astro build
